posts.author: EIIS (EIIS)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

The connection between zapier and Monday returns an error.

I’ve tried to reconnect monday to zapier, copying the API token I have this errore message:

We hit an error adding your new account

authentication failed: Error parsing response. We got: “ <!–[if I”

  1. Make sure you click “Allow” or “Accept” on the permission popup
  2. Double check your Account has the correct permissions
  3. Check out our help docs for more information

How can I do to reconnect monday?

Thank you

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @EIIS

This is because the current issue as listed here.
